name: sentry-hello-world
description: Capture your first test error with Sentry and verify it appears in the dashboard. Use when testing a new Sentry integration, verifying error capture works after install-auth, or learning how to enrich events with user context, tags, and breadcrumbs. Trigger with phrases like "test sentry", "sentry hello world", "verify sentry", "first sentry error", "sentry capture test".
